summary: A clipped Newsmax 'National Report' broadcast segment of a guest in studio discussing the DOL Inspector General's work on fraud, with a 'FEDS DEFER MORE MEDICAID FUNDING TO MN OVER FRAUD' chyron. It is a cable-news capture with no music.
notable_text: NEWSMAX NATIONAL REPORT; FEDS DEFER MORE MEDICAID FUNDING TO MN OVER FRAUD
